structured.intro: The Strait of Hormuz has functionally closed to commercial shipping. IRGC forces seized **MSC Francesca and Epaminondas** on **22 April**, bringing confirmed vessel incidents to **six in sixteen days**. Transit volumes have collapsed to **7 vessels/day** against a **110/day baseline** — a **94% reduction**. War-risk premium is **unquotable** across Lloyd's syndicates following the **Skylight constructive total loss** on 10 April, and AG–East VLCC rates have reached **$165k/day**, roughly **six times the pre-crisis anchor**.
